subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant and Testament of God! That which thou didst mention is wholly acceptable, and in the best manner possible, God willing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الثابت علی عهد الله و میثاقه آنچه مذکور داشتید کل مقبول و به احسن وجوه انشاءالله
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @martyrs and martyrdom
